docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-02-2011 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $550.00 FILED BY WEBB, JOE AS TO DEFENDANT JOHNSON, GREG ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-02-2011 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
COPYING FEES (15 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF WEBB, JOE

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WEBB, JOE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JOHNSON, GREG $500.00 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $565.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-02-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-02-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOTHING IS REPORTED.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $35.00) SERVED OCT-21-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT JOHNSON, GREG
